description: This stylish sling bag from murcia is designed for the fashion conscious. Wear it on your shoulder and turn heads wherever you go! Height:29 cm Width: 35 cm Depth: 10 cm Leatherette upper for durability Two main compartments with a zippered pocket and a mobile pouch Two short handles Zippered pocket on the back Brand badge appliqued on the front Adjustable leatherette straps with buckle design on either side Bag care Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
